nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 77. East wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 9am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 89. East wind 3 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
